reviews.review_description: When i loaded on it nearly made my vr crash because of the lag and it wasnt my internet just the game.i said to my freind get it and when we joined it was just us in a public and the monsters didnt chase us didnt make any noise and you could just run through it .not enough updates and the graphics are decent .but overall its a alright game just needs more updates and maybe a channel advertsing on youtbe or tiktok so it gains more popularity and maybe more maps

developer_response.body: Yeah,  the game is laggy in the lobby in the new update, and that part of the game might lag you out, and Ill try to fix that.

reviews.review_description: This Is a good game but fix the name pc and add a code computer because I play this game with my friends.

developer_response.body: i fixed the name computer and added a code computer

reviews.review_description:
I love this game, i play it everyday actually! But when i join i cant tell if im in a server with other people, i checked the game and it does say multiplayer, yes i know the game is still kinda new but it still needs multiplayer!
Also if you have one, add a discord server link in game so people can see!

developer_response.body:
Hey! This game is multiplayer, but barely anybody plays the game, so it may seem multiplayer.

Also, I don't have a Discord server, as it can often get games to be raided/hacked.

Thanks for playing my game dude

reviews.review_description: The monster models are fabulous and clean, the map design is immaculate and it has multiplayer with a lot of levels to keep you busy while you wait for updates, my only issue is it kicks you from the game after you get caught
